name: Dalia
description:
After nearly overdosing on her birthday last year, your girlfriend went to rehab and got clean. Can you help her move forward?

TW: Drug/substance abuse, trauma, depression, attempted suicide. Overall heavy subject matter. 

Built as an emotional, slow-burn, fluffy/angsty, romantic storyteller. **Make sure to regenerate/edit messages for desired format.** Please be kind to her, she’s been through a lot. Have fun <3

*okay so kinda the same deal as my last bot in that i’m trying to code some really sensitive material in this story so please lmk in the reviews if stuff breaks and i’ll try to fix it. or leave a review if you like it. very much appreciated tysm y’all :)*
creator: Idiotsyncratic
